allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for form in data: print\(f''Form: {form.get\(""identifier""\)} \(type={form.get\(""type""\)}\)''\) for attr in form.get\(''attributes'', []\): print\(f'' - {attr.get\(""marker""\)} \({attr.get\(""type""\)}\)''\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\): for p in data: print\(f''identifier: {p.get\(""identifier""\)}''\) print\(f'' authForm: {p.get\(""authFormIdentifier""\)}''\) print\(f'' signUpForm: {p.get\(""signUpFormIdentifier""\)}''\) else: print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:500]\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\): for p in data: print\(f''identifier: {p.get\(""identifier""\)}''\) print\(f'' authForm: {p.get\(""authFormIdentifier""\)}''\) print\(f'' signUpForm: {p.get\(""signUpFormIdentifier""\)}''\) print\(f'' localizeInfos: {p.get\(""localizeInfos""\)}''\) else: print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:500]\) ")
